query:
SELECT 
  dateLabel,
  slot,
  section,
  title,
  linkedinUrl,
  createdAt
FROM linkedin_posts
WHERE dateLabel >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY dateLabel DESC, 
  FIELD(slot, 'morning', 'startup-afternoon', 'afternoon', 'evening')
LIMIT 20;
